title: Seafood Peppery Bowl
description: A quick and flavorful Japanese-inspired seafood bowl with peppery notes.
instructions: Cook Japanese rice according to package instructions.
Prepare peppery sauce by mixing 2 tsp soy sauce, 1 tsp rice vinegar, and 1 tsp grated ginger.
Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add seafood mix and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes.
Add crispy tempura bits to the pan and stir to combine with seafood.
To assemble the bowls, place a scoop of cooked rice in the bottom, followed by the seafood and tempura mixture.
Drizzle with peppery sauce and sprinkle with sesame seeds, if using.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve with lime wedges on the side, if desired.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
